name: codesage-tools
description: Claude Code integration for CodeSage, a Rust-based code intelligence engine. Provides slash commands for onboarding a project (init + index + global MCP registration + git hooks + agent hint), reset, incremental reindex with model-mismatch cleanup, and retrieval benchmarking. A single global MCP server serves every onboarded project, routed by an absolute `project` argument on each call.
